::: top-banner
:::

# Workshop logistics

This section is reserved for venue details, travel instructions, local transportation, contact information, and online participation guidance.

## Location

Santa Cruz Island, Galápagos

## Dates

June 8 to June 12, 2026

## Venue

The workshop will be hosted on **Santa Cruz Island, Galápagos**.

The current venue is **Charles Darwin Foundation**, Santa Cruz, Galápagos. Additional access details and meeting instructions will be shared closer to the workshop date.

## Venue map

The map below shows the current venue location on Santa Cruz Island. Accommodation pins can be added later once hotels are confirmed.

<div class="map-embed">
<iframe
  title="Workshop venue map"
  src="https://maps.google.com/maps?q=Charles%20Darwin%20Research%20Station%2C%20Puerto%20Ayora%2C%20Santa%20Cruz%2C%20Gal%C3%A1pagos&z=15&output=embed"
  width="100%"
  height="360"
  style="border:0;"
  allowfullscreen=""
  loading="lazy"
  referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade"></iframe>
</div>

## Travel note

Participants may need to stay overnight on mainland Ecuador on **June 7, 2026** before flying to **Galápagos** on **June 8, 2026**, depending on their travel itinerary.

Additional travel instructions, hotel details, and local transportation information will be shared by email.
